UseCaseScenarios.title: AI Persona Research in Action
UseCaseScenarios.description: See how AI Personas built from in-depth interviews transform research across different scenarios. From testing concepts to uncovering insights, our AI Personas provide authentic responses through structured interview processes.

testing.title: Testing
testing.description: Interview AI Personas to test marketing messages, product concepts, and campaign ideas with authentic reactions.

planning.title: Planning
planning.description: Create strategic frameworks by interviewing AI Personas about preferences and priorities to inform roadmaps.

insights.title: Insights
insights.description: Uncover behavioral patterns and motivations through interviews with AI Personas representing target audiences.

creation.title: Creation
creation.description: Brainstorm and co-create with AI Personas to generate innovative ideas and validate creative concepts.

UseCases.title: AI Persona Research Studies
UseCases.description: Explore real case studies showcasing how AI Personas built from in-depth interviews and expert interviews provide deep consumer insights for better business decisions.
UseCases.noStudiesDescription: Please check back later to see our work in action.

PersonaSimulationSection.title: AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.description: Advanced AI Personas that simulate authentic human cognition. Whether using our extensive library or creating private personas from your own interview data, these agents maintain consistent personalities and behavioral frameworks to provide realistic insights.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyQuote: Our deep interview AI Personas are a form of high-precision consumer simulation technology. You can also apply this same powerful technology to your own interview transcripts to create secure, proprietary AI Personas for your exclusive use.
PersonaSimulationSection.technologyDescription: These agents maintain consistent cognitive patterns, emotional responses, and decision-making frameworks that enable authentic research conversations - achieving 85% human-like accuracy in behavioral simulation.
PersonaSimulationSection.learnMoreLink: Learn more about AI Personas from Deep Interviews
PersonaSimulationSection.accuracyDescription: Human-like behavioral consistency in AI persona responses
PersonaSimulationSection.differentiatorDescription: Unlike traditional survey data or statistical models, our AI Personas are sophisticated behavioral simulations that maintain consistent personality traits and decision-making logic in new contexts.

PersonaSimulationSection.ctaDescription: Create private, high-fidelity AI Personas from your own interview data, or leverage our extensive library to discover deep consumer insights.

TestimonialSection.title: Research Teams Love Our Results
TestimonialSection.description: See how professionals use AI persona research to understand consumer behavior and make better decisions faster.
TestimonialSection.timeDescription: Get insights in minutes, not weeks of research.

productManager.quote: We needed to understand how different user segments would react to our new feature. Atypica's AI Personas provided authentic feedback through detailed interviews, giving us insights in hours that would have taken weeks of traditional user research.
productManager.author: Elena Rodriguez
productManager.title: Senior Product Manager

marketingDirector.quote: The AI Personas built from deep interviews were incredibly realistic in their responses. We tested multiple campaign messages through persona interviews and identified the most effective approach before spending on actual ads.
marketingDirector.author: Ben Carter
marketingDirector.title: Marketing Director

founder.quote: As a startup, we couldn't afford traditional focus groups or extensive user interviews. Atypica's AI Persona research gave us deep behavioral insights and validated our assumptions at a fraction of the cost.
founder.author: Sophie Chen
founder.title: Founder & CEO

help.title: Questions?
help.description: Chat with our AI sage for instant answers

hero.body: Most agents do tasks. Atypica does something harder — it models why people choose, hesitate, and decide.

twoWorlds.quote: The world in our heads is not a precise replica of reality.
twoWorlds.attribution: — Daniel Kahneman, Thinking, Fast and Slow
twoWorlds.objectiveDesc: Quantifiable. The domain of traditional AI agents — automating tasks, processing data, executing workflows.
twoWorlds.subjectiveDesc: Contextual. The domain of human decisions — why people choose, hesitate, trust, and act.

twoAgents.title: Simulate × Research
twoAgents.body: The Simulator becomes a specific person — reconstructing how they choose, why they hesitate, what tips the balance. The Researcher asks the right questions, probes deeper, draws out what people struggle to articulate.

simulator.title: Persona + Sage
simulator.description: The Simulator becomes a specific person — not a statistical average. It reconstructs how they choose, why they hesitate, and what tips the balance.

persona.label: AI Persona
persona.description: Virtual consumers built from real behavioral data. Each carries unique values, risk profiles, and decision logic.

sage.label: AI Sage
sage.description: Domain experts with two-layer memory — core knowledge and working knowledge that grows through every consultation.

researcher.title: Research Methods
researcher.description: The Researcher asks the right questions, probes deeper, draws out what people struggle to articulate. Part interviewer, part analyst — always listening.

mockup.interviewQ1: What factors influence your purchase decisions most?
mockup.interviewA1: Honestly, peer reviews matter more than ads...
mockup.interviewQ2: Can you walk me through a recent example?
mockup.interviewA2: Last month I spent 2 weeks comparing options before...

worldModel.title: Subjective World Model
worldModel.body: Four layers of understanding, from surface expression to deep behavior. Six dimensions that define any person's decision-making world.

expression.label: Expression
expression.description: How people express themselves — social media, public statements, self-presentation.

story.label: Story
story.description: How people explain themselves — narratives, interviews, personal histories.

cognition.label: Cognition
cognition.description: How people make decisions — values, biases, mental models, judgment patterns.

behavior.label: Behavior
behavior.description: How people actually act — purchase decisions, real choices, long-term patterns.

threeModes.title: Three Ways to Understand
threeModes.body: From autonomous signal absorption to full-auto research to live human-AI dialogue.

signal.title: Signal Mode
signal.description: Always-on intelligence. The agent continuously absorbs signals from social media, surfaces trends, and delivers findings without being asked.

deep.title: Deep Mode
deep.description: End-to-end AI research — from study design to interviews to insight delivery. Weeks of work compressed into minutes.
deep.briefQuestion: How do Gen-Z consumers perceive clean beauty brands?

live.title: Live Mode
live.description: AI Researcher leads deep interviews with real people or virtual personas. Conversations become structured insights.
live.msg1: What does 'clean beauty' mean to you personally?
live.msg2: For me it's about transparency — knowing what's actually in the product.
live.msg3: When did you first start paying attention to ingredients?

dataAssets.title: Assets of the Subjective World
dataAssets.body: Callable, verifiable, always consistent — built on real behavioral data and social science models.

persona.title: AI Persona
persona.subtitle: Virtual Consumer Library
persona.description: Callable, verifiable virtual consumers built from real behavioral data. Each maintains consistent personality traits, cognitive biases, and decision frameworks.
persona.note: Enterprises can upload their own interview data to build private persona libraries.

sage.title: AI Sage
sage.subtitle: Virtual Expert Library
sage.description: Domain experts with two-layer memory — core knowledge stays stable, working knowledge grows through every consultation. Auto-detects knowledge gaps and fills them.
sage.note: Compared to traditional expert networks ($500–2,000/hr), cost reduced by ~85%.

panel.title: AI Panel
panel.subtitle: Next-Gen Research Panel
panel.description: AI virtual samples and real respondents together — real respondents provide baseline calibration, AI provides scale. No traditional panel company can offer this.
panel.note: Real-time scalable samples that combine human ground truth with AI amplification.

useCases.title: Every Scenario Where Understanding People Matters

consumerInsight.name: Consumer Insight & U&A
consumerInsight.desc: Segmentation, persona, JTBD, need-state discovery, qualitative interviews + insight reports

conceptTesting.name: Concept Testing & Innovation
conceptTesting.desc: New product concept tests, packaging / naming / value prop validation, innovation opportunity maps

brandStrategy.name: Brand Strategy & Positioning
brandStrategy.desc: Brand diagnostics, positioning & narrative, mental maps, communication propositions, audience definition

attribution.name: Attribution Analysis
attribution.desc: Drivers analysis, content / product / experience impact on conversion, decision-path decomposition

pricing.name: Pricing & Business Model
pricing.desc: Pricing model design (subscription / usage / tiered), WTP research, price architecture & upgrade paths

socialListening.name: Social Listening & Trends
socialListening.desc: Sentiment monitoring, trend reports, consumer voice synthesis across 5 platforms

userExperience.name: User Experience & VOC
userExperience.desc: VOC systems, customer journey & pain-point mapping, experience improvement roadmaps

salesTraining.name: Sales Training & Simulation
salesTraining.desc: Simulate target buyers for sales training, role-play exercises with AI personas

socialSimulation.name: Social Simulation
socialSimulation.desc: Large-scale population modeling, policy impact testing through virtual communities

ethnography.name: Ethnography & Persona
ethnography.desc: AI-augmented ethnographic studies, digital persona construction from interview data

aiInterviews.name: AI-Augmented Interviews
aiInterviews.desc: Scalable qualitative research — 1-on-1 deep interviews powered by AI interviewer agents

eventOutcome.name: Event Outcome Prediction
eventOutcome.desc: Macro / political / tech / market event forecasting via multi-perspective simulation

multiPerspective.name: Multi-Perspective Consensus
multiPerspective.desc: Persona + expert viewpoint simulation, consensus generation across diverse perspectives

signalTracking.name: Continuous Signal Tracking
signalTracking.desc: Signal tape — ongoing sentiment monitoring with real-time judgment updates

postPrediction.name: Post-Prediction Validation
postPrediction.desc: Retrospective accuracy analysis, model calibration, prediction quality scoring

food.quote: We went from months of concept testing to days — and the AI-selected concept outperformed our control by 23%.
food.body: Regular AI consumer feedback collection, validated by real interviews. Co-created chocolate concepts with AI consumers for Lunar New Year, building a concept library filtered by preference, emotional resonance, and market potential.

tools.quote: Professional users are expensive and hard to recruit. Now we have an always-on virtual panel that gives real-time feedback on our CAD prototypes.
tools.body: Built Tier-3 AI Personas from real prosumer interview data. Product teams get instant professional user feedback on concepts, interfaces, and prototypes without recruitment overhead.

university.quote: We simulated policy responses across 20,000 households in days — traditional methods would have taken years.
university.body: Interviewed core family members (couples and parents) via 1-on-1 sessions to create AI Personas, then assembled them into AI Panels. The team tested different policy measures for improving birth rates through virtual panel discussions.

prediction.quote: We call the Subjective World Model via MCP to analyze sentiment on Polymarket events — and place bets based on what the model sees.
prediction.body: An independent developer integrated Atypica's subjective world model through MCP protocol, feeding continuous sentiment signals into prediction algorithms for real-time event forecasting.

closing.title: Ready to Understand Your Users?
closing.body: Let agents model every consumer's subjective world. The harder problem — we've already started.
